steps.title: Set vertical angles equal
steps.content: The angles labeled $x$ and $y$ are vertical angles, so they are equal: $6k+13=8k-29$.

steps.title: Find k
steps.content: Solve the equation for $k$: $6k+13=8k-29$, so $42=2k$ and $k=21$.

steps.title: Use supplementary angles
steps.content: Same-side interior angles formed by parallel lines are supplementary, so $y+z=180$. Since $y=8(21)-29=139$, $z=180-139=41$. The answer is C.
